login.title: Artist Login
login.subtitle: Manage your tracks.
login.accountNotActiveYet: Your account has not been verified via email yet.

register.title: Register as Artist
register.errorEmailExists: This email address is already registered.
register.successMailSent: Registration successful! Please check your email inbox to activate your account.
register.successVerified: Your account has been successfully activated. You can now log in.
register.successAccountActivated: Your account has been successfully activated. You can now log in.

email.subjectVerify: Activate your Artist Account - Luziferase on Air
email.textVerify:
Hello!

Please click the following link to complete your registration in the Artist Upload Portal:

dashboard.subtitle: Your tracks, your details.
dashboard.contactEmail: Contact email (for internal communication and news)
dashboard.contactHint: Please provide at least an email address.
dashboard.linksHint: Up to 3 links from the list.
dashboard.newAudioOptional: New audio file (optional — leave empty to keep the existing one)
dashboard.newImageOptional: New track image (optional — leave empty to keep the existing one)

messages.profileNameRequired: Artist name must not be empty.
messages.profileContactRequired: Please provide a phone number or email as contact.
messages.profileUpdatedSyncFailed: Profile updated. Note: syncing with AzuraCast failed for at least one already-live track, please check the admin area.
messages.bpmPositive: BPM must be a positive number.
messages.quotaExceededExchange: Quota exceeded. Available for this replacement: {{remaining}} MB.
messages.trackUploaded: Track uploaded and submitted for review.
messages.trackUpdatedSynced: Track updated and synced with AzuraCast.
messages.syncFailedNote: Note: automatic AzuraCast sync failed, please check the admin area.
messages.linkSlotIncomplete: For link {{slot}}: please provide both platform AND URL (or leave both empty).

upload.imageFormatNotAllowed: Image format .{{ext}} is not allowed. Allowed: {{allowed}}
upload.fileTypeNotAllowed: File type .{{ext}} is not allowed. Allowed: {{allowed}}
